name: Kitchen Culture Holdings Ltd.
summary: Kitchen Culture Holdings Ltd., an investment holding company, sells and distributes imported kitchen systems and appliances, wardrobe systems, bathroom furniture, and household furniture and kitchen accessories. It operates in two segments, Distribution and Retail and Residential Projects. The Distribution and Retail segment sells and distributes products through a network of authorized dealers and retailers. The Residential Projects segment engages in the design, assembly, installation, testing, and inspection of various furniture and fittings, kitchen equipment, and related products. The company offers its products under the Poggenpohl, Hacker, LA Cornue, Pureform, Eggersmann, Snaidero, Rational, Kitchen Culture Kitchens, Leicht, Bora, Inventum, Kuppersbusch, Steel, Foster, Barazza, Elica Collection, Teka, Candy, Liebherr, Fimes, KFF, Tisettanta, Dall'agnese, and Tre-P & Tre-Piu brand names. It is also involved in the trading of medical and related supplies; and provision of labour services. It also undertakes fund management activities for ultra high net worth individuals and families. The company has operations in Singapore, Hong Kong, Malaysia, and China. Kitchen Culture Holdings Ltd. was founded in 1991 and is based in Singapore.
